creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 3.5.0

And also, please see http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/twisted_20081222.diff
for the update of twisted-* ports.  This patch file contains:

- Update py-twisted-* to 8.1.0
- turn devel/py-twisted into a meta port.
- Update USE_TWISTED{,_BUILD,_RUN} in bsd.python.mk:
  * Remove flow, pair, xish, which are deprecated
  * Remove USE_TWISTED=13
  * Fix typos in twisted components _DEPENDS

Port maintainer (neal@nelson.name) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
